title: athyrium tussacii
intro: Athyrium tussacii, also known as the Guadalupe fern, is a species of fern native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Athyrium tussacii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
